svg.title: Two-pointer trace over sorted array [-1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 9] searching for two numbers summing to target 7
svg.desc: Five snapshots of the two-pointer technique on a sorted array. L starts at the left end and R at the right end; when arr[L] + arr[R] is too high R moves in, when too low L moves in, and each pointer's old position is marked with a red X once it moves past. The scan ends when arr[L] + arr[R] equals the target 7, at L pointing to 3 and R pointing to 4.
